source_of_truth: Furnley House Ceding Checklist (Ceding_Checklist_-_Blank.xlsx, latest version confirmed with Reva on 2026-05-29)
scope: UAT MVP — ISA, GIA, Pension only. Bond/Final Salary/Protection deferred to Phase 2.
naming_convention: lowercase snake_case, semantically stable across plan types where the concept is identical
shared_keys_note: Several keys intentionally repeat across plan types because the underlying concept is the same — e.g. provider_name, plan_number, current_value, transfer_value, fund_lines, advice_charges.
fund_lines_note: fund_lines is a structured table, not a single value. The backend persists rows in ChecklistFundLine; the BFF extracts an array of fund objects.

gia: Evelyn Partners (Jane Lindley) — source PDF only, no filled checklist yet

multi_account_provider_note: Some providers (e.g. Evelyn Partners, other wealth managers) issue ONE consolidated PDF covering both ISA and GIA. For UAT, the CA should upload the same PDF to TWO separate cases (one per plan type). The BFF then filters by Account Code during Stage 4 extraction. Post-UAT: implement automatic multi-case split.

currency.store_as: decimal (number) OR null if Not Applicable marker present

percent.store_as: decimal between 0 and 1, OR null if Not Applicable marker present

structural_notes.contribution_history_format: contributions_4yr_history is a text field expected to contain tax-year rows in the format 'YYYY/YY: £X.XX' separated by newlines. Empty years should be marked '-'. Future v2.x may upgrade this to a structured 4-row table.
structural_notes.fund_charges_weighted_calculation: Computed by the CA using the Weighted Average Calculator. Requires per-fund TER from fund_lines[]. Often blank or 'No' when provider does not supply per-fund TER (Aviva, some pension cases).
structural_notes.with_profits_section_conditional: All With-Profit Fund fields apply ONLY if the plan holds with-profit funds. For non-WP cases, fields will be blank or N/A — this is correct, not missing data.
structural_notes.protected_tax_free_cash_conditional: PENSION-only section. Applies ONLY if pension started before 06/04/2006 (A-Day). For newer pensions, fields are blank — correct.

ISA.label: Type of ISA (Stocks & Shares / Cash / Lifetime)
Current year subscriptions (Allowance used this tax year)
Current Value — date of valuation
ISA.auto_extract_hint: When provider PDF states value 'as at DD/MM/YYYY', extract the date into this sibling field. If not present, leave null and CA will fill from system data.

ISA.label: Transfer Value (if higher than CV disclose why)
Transfer Value — date of valuation
ISA.auto_extract_hint: When provider PDF states value 'as at DD/MM/YYYY', extract the date into this sibling field. If not present, leave null and CA will fill from system data.

ISA.label: Fund Details (per fund: name, ISIN, units, price, value, charge)
Range of funds available for investment (link to fund list)
ISA.note: CAs use this field for any of: URL, comma-separated fund list, or descriptive text like '250 funds available'. Type=text accommodates all three patterns.

ISA.label: Are any of the funds held restricted for trading? Provide details.
If invested in with-profit fund — Fund Names & ISIN
Platform Charge
